summary: Midwife Contract System E2E Testing Complete - Backend 100% (13/13 tests), Frontend UI verified. Full contract workflow tested: login, contracts list, 7-step multi-step form creation, PDF download, Preview modal, Send, and Delete functionality.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test contracts created during E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Midwife contract system fully tested. All features working: login, navigation, contracts list view with Draft/Sent/Signed statuses, 7-step contract creation form with Previous/Next navigation, PDF download, Preview modal, Send functionality (signs and sends to client), Delete for Draft contracts. DELETE endpoint was added to backend during testing.

features_tested.contracts_navigation: PASS - Contracts tab in bottom navigation leads to contracts page
features_tested.contracts_list_view: PASS - Shows existing contracts with Draft/Sent/Signed status badges
features_tested.new_contract_modal: PASS - Opens 7-step multi-step form with progress indicator
features_tested.form_step_navigation: PASS - Previous/Next buttons navigate between all 7 sections
features_tested.contract_creation: PASS - Creates contract with all fields, auto-calculates remaining balance
features_tested.preview_modal: PASS - Shows full contract preview with Parties, Payment, Full Agreement sections
features_tested.send_contract: PASS - Signs contract as midwife and sends to client (status changes to Sent)
features_tested.client_signing: PASS - Public endpoint allows client to sign (status changes to Signed)
features_tested.delete_draft_contract: PASS - DELETE endpoint added and working for Draft contracts only

contract_form_sections_verified: 1. Parties & Basic Details (Client Name, Partner, Due Date)
2. Place of Birth & Scope (Birth Location, Services Description)
3. Fees & Payment (Total Fee, Retainer, Fee Coverage, Refund Policy)

backend_fix_applied.issue: DELETE endpoint for midwife contracts was missing
